name: Redwood Concrete Pumping
tagline: Family-run concrete pumping in the North Bay since 1981
seoDescription: Redwood Concrete Pump — family-owned, woman-owned concrete line and boom pumping serving Santa Rosa, Sonoma, Napa & Marin counties since 1981.

sections.heading: The North Bay's longest-running concrete pumping family, since 1981
sections.subheading: ACPA-certified operators placing concrete cleanly and efficiently across Sonoma, Napa, and Marin counties.

sections.heading: About Redwood Concrete Pumping
body: Redwood Concrete Pump is a multi-generational, family-owned business that has been placing concrete across the North Bay since 1981. The Worden family treats every yard of concrete with care, getting the mud exactly where your crew needs it — from the ready-mix truck straight into your forms.

As a Certified Woman Business Enterprise and a registered public works subcontractor, Redwood handles everything from complex commercial and public works pours to tight-access residential jobs. Their ACPA-certified operators are known for being efficient, clean, and patient on every site.

items.title: Commercial Concrete Pumping
items.description: Slab-on-grade, drilled pier foundations, tilt-up walls, post-tension slabs, and public works infrastructure.

items.title: Residential Concrete Pumping
items.description: Foundations, driveways, patios, pool decks, walkways, retaining walls, and ADU pours — including difficult-access sites.

items.title: Drilled Piers & Foundations
items.description: Pier foundations and structural concrete for solar arrays, decks, and hillside projects.

items.title: Specialty Pumping
items.description: Well seals and abatements, void filling, lightweight multi-story pumping, and pump/operator rental.

items.title: Public Works & Infrastructure
items.description: Registered public works subcontractor for municipal, utility, and ADA infrastructure pours.

items.title: Reach out
items.body: Call or message Redwood Concrete Pumping and tell us what you need.

items.title: We assess
items.body: We look at the details and talk through the right approach with you.

items.title: We do the work
items.body: Our team handles it properly, keeping you in the loop along the way.

items.title: You’re set
items.body: The job’s done right, and we stand behind it.

items.title: Family-Owned & Operated Since 1981
items.body: Rooted right here in Santa Rosa, CA, with a real stake in doing it right.

items.title: Certified Woman Business Enterprise (WBE)
items.body: Properly credentialed, so the work is covered and done to standard.

items.title: Registered Public Works Subcontractor (DIR)
items.body: A standard we hold on every job, not just the easy ones.

items.title: ACPA-Certified, Fully Bonded & Insured Operators
items.body: Properly credentialed, so the work is covered and done to standard.

items.title: Serving Sonoma, Napa & Marin Counties
items.body: A standard we hold on every job, not just the easy ones.

items.quote: Yesterday we had 6 yards of concrete delivered. Their pump guy was efficient, clean and patient. The whole operation went very smoothly.
items.author: Douglas Bryant

items.quote: Do yourself a favor and hire here guys. Their rates are reasonable and worth the exceptional service qualities.
items.author: Rod A.

items.quote: We had a semi difficult pour of 7 yards delivered to Bolinas. Their pump guy was efficient, clean and patient.
items.author: Daniel Sereni

sections.heading: Work with Redwood Concrete Pumping
sections.body: Find us at 1372 Los Alamos Rd. Call (707) 538-1206 — we’re glad to help.
